violations.text: Clam chowder and broccoli cheddar soup was observed held at 121-130 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC reheated at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in cooler (bakery) fans have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2026

Ham was observed held at 45-47 degrees Fahrenheit in the ham cooler. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per person in charge, ham had been in the ham cooler for an unknown amount of time. Ham was voluntarily disposed of (see disposal form). The ambient air temperature was observed at 48 degrees Fahrenheit during time of inspection. Ham cooler was taken out of service and must not be used until it can maintain an internal food temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below. Ham cooler must be repaired/adjusted/replaced. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2024

A clean utensil was observed stored between the wall and the 3-bay sink in the deli department. Clean utensils must be stored on a clean surface. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2024
